devdoc.details: Upgradeable contract using proxy pattern Production changes: - Fixes critical repay accounting bug (no double-subtraction of repaid amounts) - Adds fair lender yield distribution via supply index (interest paid only) - Protocol fees are segregated; do not block LP principal withdrawals - Interest continues accruing after due date - Owner-only expiry for Approved requests - Optional public "mark overdue" for correct status transitions - Strict ERC20 transfers (reverts on fee-on-transfer style behavior)

EnforcedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is paused.

ExpectedPause().details: The operation failed because the contract is not paused.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

SafeERC20FailedOperation(address).details: An operation with an ERC-20 token failed.

ETHReceived(address,uint256,uint256).details: ETH is for operational purposes only (gas sponsorship, etc.)

params.amount: Amount of ETH received in wei
params.blockNumber: Block number when ETH was received

ETHWithdrawn(address,uint256,uint256).details: ETH is operational only; not part of lending pools

params.admin: Address of the admin making withdrawal (indexed)
params.amount: Amount of ETH withdrawn in wei

EmergencyWithdraw(address,uint256,uint25.details: Only callable by admin in emergency situations

params.blockNumber: Block number when emergency withdrawal occurred

Initialized(uint64).details: Triggered when the contract has been initialized or reinitialized.

params.baseRateBps: New base rate in basis points
params.protocolFeeBps: New protocol fee in basis points

LoanBorrowed(uint256,address,address,uin.details: `initialOwed` equals `principal` at borrow time (no interest yet)

params.initialOwed: Initial amount owed (equals principal, no interest yet)
params.startBlock: Block number when borrowing occurred (interest starts)

LoanMovedToUnpaidDebt(uint256,address,ui.details: Triggered when deadline passes with outstanding balance

params.deadlineBlock: The original deadline block that was missed
params.loanId: Loan identifier moved to unpaid debt (indexed)

params.remainingBalance: Outstanding balance after repayment (0 if fully repaid)

params.borrower: Address of the borrower whose loan was approved (indexed)
Address of the borrower whose loan was rejected (indexed)

params.blockNumber: Block number when request was submitted
params.borrower: Address of the borrower submitting the request (indexed)
params.loanAmount: Requested loan amount in token decimals
params.loanId: Unique identifier assigned to the loan (indexed for filtering)

Paused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`.

params.blockNumber: Block number when pool was added
params.token: ERC20 token address for the new pool (indexed)

params.blockNumber: Block number when limits were updated
params.maxLoanAmount: New maximum loan amount in token decimals
params.minLoanAmount: New minimum loan amount in token decimals
params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool (indexed)

params.blockNumber: Block number when pool was removed
params.token: ERC20 token address of the removed pool (indexed)

params.admin: Address of the admin making withdrawal (indexed)

Unpaused(address).details: Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`.

addLiquidityPool(address,uint256,uint256.details: Requirements:   - Token must be a valid ERC20 contract   - Pool must not already exist for this token   - minLoanAmount must be <= maxLoanAmount

params.maxLoanAmount: Maximum loan amount in token decimals
params.minLoanAmount: Minimum loan amount in token decimals
params.token: ERC20 token address for the new pool

approveLoanRequest(uint256).details: Transitions loan from Pending to Approved status.      The borrower then has approvedLoanExpiryBlocks to call borrow().

params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to approve

borrow(uint256,uint256).details: Requirements:   - Loan must be in Approved status   - Caller must be the loan's borrower   - tokenAmount must be > 0 and <= approved loanAmount   - Sufficient liquidity must be available in the pool   - Can only be called once per loan; unused approved amount is forfeited

params.tokenAmount: Amount to borrow (may be less than approved amount)

calculateBorrowRate(address).details: Rate is determined by pool utilization: borrowedAmount / totalLiquidity      Higher utilization = higher rates to incentivize deposits

params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool

returns.rateBps: Current borrow rate in basis points (1 BPS = 0.01%)

canSubmitRequest(address).details: Returns false if user has active loan, unpaid debt, or is in cooldown

returns._0: True if user is eligible to submit a request

depositLiquidity(address,uint256).details: Requirements:   - Token must have an active liquidity pool   - Caller must approve token transfer to contract   - Amount must be > 0

params.amount: Amount to deposit in token decimals

emergencyWithdraw(address,uint256).details: Safer emergency withdraw: only allows withdrawing tokens NOT configured as a pool token.      For pool tokens, use withdrawProtocolFees().

getAccruedInterest(uint256).details: Uses simple interest: principal × rate × elapsedBlocks / (blocksPerYear × BPS)      Returns 0 for loans that haven't been borrowed yet

params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to query

returns.accruedInterest: Accrued interest amount in token decimals

getActiveLenderCount(address).details: A lender is "active" if their depositedAmount > 0

params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool

getActiveLoanByBorrower(address).details: Returns 0 if the borrower has no Active or UnpaidDebt loan

params.borrower: Address of the borrower to query

getApprovedLoanAmount(uint256).details: Returns 0 for non-approved loans or invalid IDs

params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to query

returns.approvedAmount: Maximum amount the borrower can borrow (in token decimals)

getCooldownEndBlock(address).details: Returns 0 if user has never made a request

returns.cooldownEndBlock: Block number when cooldown expires (0 if no cooldown)

getLenderPosition(address,address).details: Returns deposited amount, accrued interest, and total withdrawable

params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool
ERC20 token address of the pool

returns.pool: LiquidityPool struct with current pool state

getLoan(uint256).details: **IMPORTANT: This function performs VIRTUAL STATUS PROJECTION**      The returned loan status may differ from actual storage state.            For Active loans past their deadline, this function returns UnpaidDebt      even if storage still shows Active. This is for UI convenience.            **Storage State Transitions:**      - Storage transitions to UnpaidDebt occur via:        1. Explicit call to `markLoanOverdue(loanId)` (anyone can call)        2. Automatic transition in state-changing functions like `repay()`            **Frontend/Indexer Considerations:**      - Frontends should use this function for display purposes      - Indexers should track both projected status (from getLoan) and actual storage      - State-changing operations use actual storage status, not projected status      - To sync storage with projection, call `markLoanOverdue()` before state changes

params.loanId: The ID of the loan to retrieve

returns.loan: Loan struct with potentially projected status

getLoansByBorrower(address).details: Returns loans in all statuses (historical and current)

params.borrower: Address of the borrower to query

returns._0: Array of loan IDs belonging to the borrower

getLoansByStatus(uint8,uint256,uint256).details: Useful for admin dashboards and indexers

params.limit: Maximum number of results to return

returns.loanIds: Array of loan IDs matching the status

params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool

returns.maxLoanAmount: Current maximum loan amount in token decimals
returns.minLoanAmount: Current minimum loan amount in token decimals

returns._0: RateCurveParams struct with all rate parameters

getProtocolFees(address).details: Fees accumulate from interest payments; withdrawable by admin

returns.balance: Accumulated fee amount in token decimals

getRemainingBalance(uint256).details: Returns totalOwed - amountRepaid; 0 if fully repaid

params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to query

getTotalOwed(uint256).details: Returns principal + accrued interest (simple interest model)

params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to query

returns.totalOwed: Total owed amount in token decimals

returns._0: True if user has a loan in UnpaidDebt status

markLoanOverdue(uint256).details: This function syncs storage state with the virtual status projection from getLoan().      Anyone can call this to ensure storage reflects the actual overdue status.            **Why this exists:**      - getLoan() performs virtual status projection for UI convenience      - Storage may lag behind until this function is called      - State-changing functions (like repay()) automatically transition overdue loans      - This function allows explicit synchronization of storage with projection            **Effects:**      - Updates loan.status to UnpaidDebt in storage      - Updates status arrays and counters      - Emits LoanMovedToUnpaidDebt event            **Pause Behavior:**      - This function is intentionally NOT pausable to allow status maintenance during emergencies      - Status transitions don't move funds, only update accounting state

params.loanId: The ID of the overdue loan to mark

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pause().details: When paused: no new loans, borrows, repayments, deposits, or withdrawals      Uses OpenZeppelin Pausable pattern

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

rejectLoanRequest(uint256).details: Transitions loan from Pending to Rejected status (terminal).

params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to reject

removeLiquidityPool(address).details: **Warning:** Any accumulated undistributed interest (rounding dust) will be lost      when the pool is removed. This is typically negligible but should be considered.      Ensure all lenders have withdrawn before removing a pool.

params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool to remove

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

repay(uint256,uint256).details: **Pause Behavior:** This function is intentionally NOT pausable to allow borrowers      to repay debts during emergencies. Preventing repayments during pause could unfairly      penalize borrowers with accruing interest while they cannot act.

params.amount: Amount to repay in token decimals
params.loanId: Identifier of the loan to repay

submitLoanRequest(uint16,address,uint256.details: Requirements:   - Caller must not have an active or unpaid loan   - Caller must be past cooldown period from last request   - Token must have an active liquidity pool   - Amount must be within pool's [minLoanAmount, maxLoanAmount]   - Duration must be within [minLoanDurationBlocks, maxLoanDurationBlocks]   - walletReputation must be >= minReputation threshold

params.loanAmount: Requested loan amount in token decimals

returns.loanId: Unique identifier assigned to the new loan request

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

updateMinReputation(uint16).details: New threshold applies to future requests only

updatePoolLoanLimits(address,uint256,uin.details: New limits apply to future loan requests only

params.maxLoanAmount: New maximum loan amount in token decimals
params.minLoanAmount: New minimum loan amount in token decimals
params.token: ERC20 token address of the pool

updatePoolRateCurve(address,uint256,uint.details: New rates apply to future loans only; existing loans keep their locked rate

withdrawETH(uint256).details: ETH is for operational purposes only; not part of lending pools

params.amount: Amount of ETH to withdraw in wei

withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256).details: Requirements:   - Caller must have sufficient deposited balance   - Pool must have sufficient available liquidity (not borrowed)

params.amount: Amount of principal to withdraw in token decimals

withdrawProtocolFees(address,uint256).details: Fees are collected from interest payments on repaid loans

params.amount: Amount of fees to withdraw in token decimals
params.token: ERC20 token address to withdraw fees from

MAX_BLOCKS_FOR_INTEREST.details: Prevents runaway interest accrual on abandoned loans
MAX_BLOCKS_FOR_INTEREST.return: Maximum blocks to use in interest calculation

returns._0: Maximum blocks to use in interest calculation

MAX_BORROWER_RATE.return: Maximum annual borrow rate in basis points

returns._0: Maximum annual borrow rate in basis points

MAX_PENDING_LOANS_PER_USER.details: Prevents spam; user must wait for resolution before new requests
MAX_PENDING_LOANS_PER_USER.return: Maximum number of concurrent pending loans

returns._0: Maximum number of concurrent pending loans

MIN_BORROWER_RATE.return: Minimum annual borrow rate in basis points

returns._0: Minimum annual borrow rate in basis points

approvedLoanExpiryBlocks.details: Approved loans must be borrowed within this period or expire
approvedLoanExpiryBlocks.return: Expiry duration in blocks after approval

returns._0: Expiry duration in blocks after approval

blockTimeSeconds.details: Used for interest calculations: blocksPerYear = 365.25 days / blockTimeSeconds
blockTimeSeconds.return: Block time in seconds (e.g., 12 for Ethereum mainnet)

returns._0: Block time in seconds (e.g., 12 for Ethereum mainnet)

loanCounter.return: Current total number of loans created

returns._0: Current total number of loans created

maxLoanDurationBlocks.details: Loan requests with longer durations will revert

minLoanDurationBlocks.details: Loan requests with shorter durations will revert

minReputation.return: Minimum reputation score required for loan requests (0-1000)

returns._0: Minimum reputation score required for loan requests (0-1000)

devdoc.title: Unlloo

CooldownBlocksUpdated(uint256,uint256,ui.notice: Emitted when cooldown period between loan requests is updated

ETHReceived(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when ETH is received by the contract

ETHWithdrawn(address,uint256,uint256).notice: Emitted when admin withdraws ETH from the contract

InterestRatesUpdated(address,uint256,uin.notice: Emitted when pool interest rate parameters are updated

LiquidityDeposited(address,address,uint2.notice: Emitted when a lender deposits liquidity into a pool

LiquidityWithdrawn(address,address,uint2.notice: Emitted when a lender withdraws liquidity from a pool

LoanBorrowed(uint256,address,address,uin.notice: Emitted when an approved loan is executed (funds disbursed)

LoanMovedToUnpaidDebt(uint256,address,ui.notice: Emitted when a loan transitions to UnpaidDebt status

LoanRepaid(uint256,address,address,uint2.notice: Emitted on each loan repayment (partial or full)

LoanRequestApproved(uint256,address,uint.notice: Emitted when an admin approves a pending loan request

LoanRequestRejected(uint256,address,uint.notice: Emitted when an admin rejects a pending loan request

LoanRequestSubmitted(uint256,address,uin.notice: Emitted when a borrower submits a new loan request

MinReputationUpdated(uint16,uint16,uint2.notice: Emitted when minimum reputation threshold is updated

PoolAdded(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a new liquidity pool is added for a token

PoolLoanLimitsUpdated(address,uint256,ui.notice: Emitted when pool loan limits are updated

PoolRemoved(address,uint256).notice: Emitted when a liquidity pool is removed

ProtocolFeesWithdrawn(address,address,ui.notice: Emitted when admin withdraws accumulated protocol fees

MAX_BLOCKS_FOR_INTEREST().notice: Get maximum blocks for interest calculation

MAX_BORROWER_RATE().notice: Maximum borrower rate in basis points (50% = 5000)

MAX_PENDING_LOANS_PER_USER().notice: Get maximum pending loan requests per user

MIN_BORROWER_RATE().notice: Minimum borrower rate in basis points (5% = 500)

addLiquidityPool(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Add a new liquidity pool for a token (admin only)

approveLoanRequest(uint256).notice: Approve a pending loan request (admin only)

approvedLoanExpiryBlocks().notice: Get expiry period for approved loans

blockTimeSeconds().notice: Get configured block time for the chain

borrow(uint256,uint256).notice: Execute borrowing on an approved loan

calculateBorrowRate(address).notice: Calculate current borrow rate for a token pool

canSubmitRequest(address).notice: Check if a user can submit a new loan request

cooldownBlocks().notice: Get current cooldown period between loan requests

defaultToken().notice: Get the default token address used for new pools

depositLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Deposit liquidity into a token pool to earn yield

expireApprovedLoan(uint256).notice: Owner-only expiry for Approved requests (prevents permanent openRequestCount lock)

getAccruedInterest(uint256).notice: Calculate current accrued interest for a loan

getActiveLenderCount(address).notice: Get count of active lenders in a pool

getActiveLoanByBorrower(address).notice: Get the active or unpaid loan ID for a borrower

getApprovedLoanAmount(uint256).notice: Get the maximum approved amount for a loan

getCooldownEndBlock(address).notice: Get the block number when cooldown ends for a user

getLenderPosition(address,address).notice: Get lender position with calculated interest

getLiquidityPool(address).notice: Get aggregate pool state for a token

getLoan(uint256).notice: Get loan information with virtual status projection

getLoansByBorrower(address).notice: Get all loan IDs for a specific borrower

getLoansByStatus(uint8,uint256,uint256).notice: Get loan IDs filtered by status with pagination

getPoolLoanLimits(address).notice: Get current loan limits for a pool

getPoolRateCurve(address).notice: Get the interest rate curve parameters for a pool

getProtocolFees(address).notice: Get accumulated protocol fees for a token

getRemainingBalance(uint256).notice: Calculate remaining balance after accounting for repayments

getTotalOwed(uint256).notice: Calculate total amount currently owed on a loan

hasUnpaidDebt(address).notice: Check if a user has any unpaid debt

loanCounter().notice: Get the current loan counter (next loan ID will be this + 1)

markLoanOverdue(uint256).notice: Mark an overdue Active loan as UnpaidDebt in storage

openRequestCount(address).notice: Number of open requests (Pending or Approved) per borrower

rejectLoanRequest(uint256).notice: Reject a pending loan request (admin only)

repay(uint256,uint256).notice: Make a repayment on an active loan

submitLoanRequest(uint16,address,uint256.notice: Submit a new loan request to the protocol

unpaidDebtLoanCount(address).notice: Number of loans in UnpaidDebt status per borrower

unpause().notice: Resume protocol operations after pause (admin only)

updateCooldownBlocks(uint256).notice: Update cooldown period between loan requests (admin only)

updateMinReputation(uint16).notice: Update minimum reputation threshold for loan requests (admin only)

updatePoolLoanLimits(address,uint256,uin.notice: Update loan amount limits for a pool (admin only)

updatePoolRateCurve(address,uint256,uint.notice: Update interest rate curve parameters for a specific pool (admin only)

withdrawLiquidity(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw liquidity (principal + earned interest) from a pool

userdoc.notice: Decentralized lending protocol with reputation-based loan requests
